title: Drop shaft
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''drop shaft''' used variable [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] fields to alter [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] within a tube. There were two fields acting in concert; one controlling ascent, and the other governing the descent. Individuals entered the shaft without the aid of a car or platform, and were either pushed upward or floated down gently. Each floor attached to the shaft included miniature [[Repulsorlift generator/Legends|repulsorlift generators]] that created an invisible walkway and landing. Drop shafts were used throughout the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] in corporate headquarters, [[Authority Data Center]]s, and shopping concourses to add a touch of glamour.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1984-12-XX -->''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''
*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''
